narrative:
Defiance County has 25,771 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.4% of registrants.
